LanguageData.Ammo_AntyAcidRifle.label: Anty Acid Cartridge
LanguageData.Ammo_AntyAcidRifle.description: Specialised munitions filled with acid produced by anty, used in a number of their weapons.
LanguageData.Ammo_AntyGlueLauncher.label: anty glue canister
LanguageData.Ammo_AntyGlueLauncher.description: Container holding glue for use in anty support weapons.
LanguageData.Ammo_AntyAcidRed.label: Anty Hydroheliumion Cartridge
LanguageData.Ammo_AntyAcidRed.description: High strength mixture made of Anty-acid combined with Refleum.
LanguageData.Ammo_CrossbowBolt_AntyAcid.label: crossbow bolt (Acid)
LanguageData.Bullet_AntyAcidRifle.label: Acid Bullet
LanguageData.Bullet_AntyRedAcidLine.label: Red Burst Bullet
LanguageData.Bullet_AntyAcidLauncher.label: Acid Grenade
LanguageData.Bullet_AntyRedAcidLauncher.label: Red Burst Bullet
LanguageData.Bullet_AntyRedAcidCluster.label: Red Burst Cluster
LanguageData.Bullet_AntyRedAcidCluster_Frag.label: Red Burst Cluster
LanguageData.Bullet_AntyGlueLauncher.label: glue grenade
LanguageData.Projectile_CrossbowBolt_AntyAcid.label: crossbow bolt (acid)
LanguageData.Bullet_AntyAcidGlue.label: Acid Bullet
